title: Carpride Ultimate Car Wash & Wax, Professional Finish, 1L Concentrated Formula
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PROFESSIONAL, SHOWROOM FINISH: Carpride Ultimate Wash & Wax is a high-concentrated shampoo with added Carnuba Wax. The formula brings a sparkling clean look to your vehicle paintwork whilst giving it long-lasting protection.
CLEANS & POLISHES: Carpride Ultimate Wash & Wax, designed to quickly remove surface dirt and grime from your vehicle, add a protective layer and leave a showroom quality high gloss finish

CAR CLEANING MADE EASY: Carpride Ultimate Wash & Wax, is super concentrated. Shake bottle well before use. Rise off loose dirt with cold water. Add 2 capfuls to a bucket of warm water. Clean car using a soft sponge or cloth. Rinse off with clean water and dry with chamois leather.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Carpride Ultimate Car Wash & Wax, 1L Bottle. Always store in an upright position, in a cool dry place.
description: Product Description Carpride® Ultimate Wash & Wax, salt free, high-concentrated shampoo with added carnuba wax. Designed to quickly remove surface dirt and grime from your vehicle. The formula brings a sparkling clean look to your vehicle paintwork whilst giving it a long-lasting protection. Super concentrated. Shake bottle well before use. Rinse off loose dirt with cold water. Add 2 capfuls to a bucket of warm water. Clean car using a soft sponge or cloth. Rinse off with clean water and dry with chamois leather. Search Amazon.co.uk for a range of Carpride® car care products. 1L Bottle. Always store in an upright position, in a cool dry place. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Soap, Anionic Surfactants, Nonionic Surfactants, also contains; Diazolidinyl Urea, Methyl Paraben, Propyl Paraben.
